title: Oerstedianthus tuerckheimii

The genus Oerstedianthus is a monotypic genus, meaning it is composed of only one species. The classification of Oerstedianthus tuerckheimii is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the Rubiaceae family. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification of this species.
